title: sesleria uliginosa f. cylindrica
intro: Sesleria uliginosa f. cylindrica, also known as Marsh Fescue or Sesleria, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in essential oils, which provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestion. Sesleria uliginosa f. cylindrica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine.
